errorPage.title: Deze pagina is verdwaald.
errorPage.message: De link is verbroken, de pagina is verwijderd, of iemand heeft iets hoopvols in de adresbalk getypt. Hoe dan ook laten we je terugbrengen naar iets dat bestaat.

contactForm.name: Je naam
contactForm.referral: Hoe heb je over mij gehoord?

success.title: Bedankt, {name}.
success.message: Je bericht is in mijn inbox. Ik neem binnen twee werkdagen contact met je op.

consentBanner.necessaryText: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly. They ensure basic functionalities and security features of the website, anonymously.
consentBanner.measurementText: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.

banner.title: We value your privacy
banner.text: This site uses cookies to improve your browsing experience, analyze site traffic.

settings.title: Privacy Settings
settings.text: Customize your privacy settings here. You can choose which types of cookies and tracking technologies you allow.
